name: education_cold_chain_excursion_threatens_lumen_car_fair
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education cold chain excursion threatens lumen car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Darius Haddad
agents.identity: I am Darius Haddad, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Priya Park
agents.identity: I am Priya Park, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Darius Haddad must decide under care vs fairness. What does Darius Haddad do?
